meaning: n.(放咖啡,茶叶,烟等的)小罐,筒,[军](防毒面具的)滤毒罐
examples: If you go through your white flour in less than a year, you can safely keep it on the counter in an airtight jar or canister.
The bag contained her school gym clothes, a plastic canister with vitamin drinks, and a lunchbox.
It even has an onboard oxygen canister.
The police have told me they think it was an aerosol or gas canister.
The T-shirt gun had a new CO2 canister that blasted away with a healthy thump.
